kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : psycopg2.connect(port='5432', dbname='painamnae', user='painamnae_user', password=***, host='dpg-d668h26r433s73dd1h0g-a.singapore-postgres.render.com')
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Query returned 1 rows
Rowcurrent_database
0painamnae
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg:
Query returned 1 rows
Rowversion
0PostgreSQL 18.1 (Debian 18.1-1.pgdg12+2) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Debian 12.2.0-14+deb12u1) 12.2.0, 64-bit
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//label[contains(.,'ข้าพเจ้ายินยอมรับ')]//input[@type='checkbox']
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//label[contains(.,'ข้าพเจ้ายินยอมรับ')]//input[@type='checkbox']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//label[contains(.,'ข้าพเจ้ายินยอมรับ')]//input[@type='checkbox']
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Query
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
SELECT "verificationStatus","isVerified","ocrVerificationStatus","ocrData" FROM "User" WHERE "email"='test23649@w.com';

Query returned 0 rows
RowverificationStatusisVerifiedocrVerificationStatusocrData
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Convert To Boolean
kw.doc: Converts the given item to Boolean ``True`` or ``False``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Execute Sql String
kw.msg:
Executing sql:
DELETE FROM "User" WHERE "email"='test23649@w.com';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

test.name: TC2 Medium Confidence - Pending
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC3 Low Confidence - Reject
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC4 OCR Fail - Reject
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC5 Face Fail - Reject
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=53679): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/9ec36c09a2eb6202f37199df05eb60e7

Retrying (Retry(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=53679): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/9ec36c09a2eb6202f37199df05eb60e7

Retrying (Retry(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=53679): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/9ec36c09a2eb6202f37199df05eb60e7
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

errors.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=53679): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/9ec36c09a2eb6202f37199df05eb60e7
